description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs only when CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE matches pipeline, web, or api and the variable INTERNAL_RELEASE_PIPELINE is set to release or true. Define a manual job internal_release_release:start in the internal_release:release:start stage that executes `bundle exec rake 'internal:release:start'`. Add a job internal_release_release:create_dynamic_pipeline in the internal_release:release stage that runs `set -eo pipefail` then `bundle exec rake 'internal:release:generate_dynamic_pipeline'`, saves the generated dynamic-gitlab-ci.yml as an artifact, and inherits the common job setup and the same rules. Finally, add a job internal_release_release:build_package in the internal_release:release stage that triggers a downstream pipeline using the dynamic-gitlab-ci.yml artifact and a local secrets file, forwards all pipeline variables, and uses the depend strategy, also inheriting the same rule condition.
